name: the SARIF bus normalizes a routed tool's output into a single merged SARIF 2.1.0 log
command: printf 'resource "aws_s3_bucket" "b" {}\n' > main.tf && RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/run-tool.sh" --tool checkov --file main.tf --json 2>/dev/null > t.sarif; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/sarif-aggregate.sh" --in t.sarif --json 2>/dev/null > merged.json; node -e 'process.exit(JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("merged.json","utf8")).version==="2.1.0"?0:1)' && echo bus-single-sarif-log 1>&2
